characterCraft.note: At 160x360 the 13x21 rigger keeps a helmet, face, backpack, facing, separate limbs, gait, climbing, bracing, and hurt poses. Four smaller workers retain trade-specific helmets and tools, individual silhouettes, gait and panic poses, matching MACHINE HUNT's micro-character clarity and BLOCK MINE's role identity without enlarging the cast.

environmentCraft.note: The strip reads as a built industrial tower with riveted decks, cross-bracing, usable and broken ladders, catwalk gaps, pipes, tanks, lamps, pistons, foreground steel, skyline depth, and district landmarks. Its material layering and occupied-world density meet MACHINE HUNT and the authored construction floor established by BLOCK MINE.

levelVariety.note: Freight Dock, Boiler Works, Dynamo Spire, and Crane Crown alter tower silhouette, landmarks, lighting, machinery, props, and palette. The montage directly shows the enclosed freight frame, cyan turbine composition, and open orange crane crown, a structural progression comparable to the reference games rather than a palette swap.

animationImpact.note: Aligned real-pixel bursts verify climbing limbs, a worker joining the convoy, and barrel rotation and travel. The 240-frame purge warning, cascading hazards, panic reactions, physical cage boarding and ascent, broad confetti, hitstop and slow motion give signature beats anticipation and follow-through at the reference floor.

readability.note: The RESCUE PRIORITY objective, actor facing and poses, amber world-level purge column, full-width barrel runway, helmet colors, convoy HUD, and rooftop cage remain distinguishable at native size without computed waypoints, reticles, or route lines. Actor footprints stay near six to seven percent in sampled play, leaving ample world and approach room.

artDirectionCohesion.note: Steel values, safety yellow, rescue green, coral danger, helmet accents, signage, industrial HUD panels, hazard stripes, particles, and landmark lighting share one authored rescue-tower grammar across every district. The presentation is as internally coherent as MACHINE HUNT and BLOCK MINE while retaining its own emergency-rigger identity.
